sources.name: Intangible Assets
sources.rationale: premium gross margins 60% reflect brand/IP power; large revenue base (422B) enables sustained IP investment

sources.name: Network Effect
sources.rationale: strong 22% revenue growth; high EPS growth 82% (operating leverage from scale)

sources.name: Cost Advantage
sources.rationale: gross margins 60% vs 40% industry (massive cost advantage); operating margin 36% vs 15% (extreme efficiency); massive scale ($422B revenue) enables fixed-cost absorption

sources.name: Efficient Scale
sources.rationale: premium 60% gross margins sustained (high barriers); $100B+ revenue scale creates massive entry barrier

analysis: Switching Costs and Intangible Assets and Network Effect create a durable competitive fortress. The company's moat is reinforced by multiple reinforcing factors, making it unlikely competitors can erode its position in the next decade.
